title: Martínez Roca
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
[[File:MartinezRocaLogo.png|thumb|right|195px|Logo]]
'''Ediciones Martínez Roca''', known commonly as '''Martínez Roca''', is a company formerly responsible for publishing many of the [[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]] translations of ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels. The company prints both fiction and non-fiction. They focus primarily on historic novels, but also work with science fiction and fantasy. They acquired the rights to the ''Star Wars'' books in [[1992]], but sold them to [[Alberto Santos Editor]] in [[2001]].

They have published twenty-nine adult novels and five young reader novels under the ''Star Wars'' name.

{{Company-stub|real}}
